data.description:
## Context
Key lifecycle: trust-on-first-use for the genesis key, and key add/rotate/revoke versions must be signed by a currently-valid key (git-bug's unimplemented IsProtected, filled). Validity is scoped to merged-log position, not wall-clock.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Key add/rotate/revoke is refused unless signed by a currently-valid key of that identity (test asserts unsigned key-add refused).
- [ ] An event signed by a key revoked at an earlier era fails; one from the key's valid era passes (test).
- [ ] Validity is scoped to merged-log position (era), not attacker-controllable event timestamps.
data.title: identity: TOFU genesis + G2 signed key-rotation chain + era-scoped validity
